# source: https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/43488
# repo: home-assistant/core
# title: Logging not working anymore due to MariaDB issue (Cannot add or update a child row)
# 
# <!-- READ THIS FIRST:
#   - If you need additional help with this template, please refer to https://www.home-assistant.io/help/reporting_issues/
#   - Make sure you are running the latest version of Home Assistant before reporting an issue: https://github.com/home-assistant/core/releases
#   - Do not report issues for integrations if you are using custom components or integrations.
#   - Provide as many details as possible. Paste logs, configuration samples and code into the backticks.
#   DO NOT DELETE ANY TEXT from this template! Otherwise, your issue may be closed without comment.
# -->
# ## The problem
# All of a sudden my Home Assistant installation is having issues with logging to MariaDB.
# I'm running Home Assistant Supervised v. 0.117.0 in Docker on Ubuntu installed on an Intel NUC.
# The

## Traceback/Error logs
<!--
  If you come across any trace or error logs, please provide them.
-->
expected_fix_hint: Add UPSERT / handle unique constraint collision; transaction rollback.
